User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Vocaro application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

PublicProfile.title: PublicProfile
PublicProfile.description: Represents the publicly visible information of a user.

displayName_lowercase.description: The user's public display name in lowercase for searching.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the profile was created.

Friendship.title: Friendship
Friendship.description: Represents a friendship link between two users, including its status.

requesterId.description: The user ID of the person who initiated the friendship request.

recipientId.description: The user ID of the person who received the friendship request.

status.description: The current status of the friendship request.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the friendship request was created.

Subject.title: Subject
Subject.description: Represents a subject (e.g., Spanish, Math) created by the user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subject entity.

emoji.description: The emoji associated with the subject.

Stack.title: Stack
Stack.description: Represents a stack of vocabulary words within a subject.

id.description: Unique identifier for the stack entity.

name.description: The name of the vocabulary stack.

Vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
Vocabulary.description: Represents a vocabulary word or phrase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the vocabulary entity.

definition.description: The definition of the vocabulary word or phrase.

phonetic.description: The phonetic transcription of the term.

notes.description: Optional contextual notes, examples, or hints for the term.

aiNote.description: An AI-generated tip or mnemonic for remembering the term.

source.description: The source of the vocabulary item, either 'ai' or 'manual'.

isMastered.description: True if the user has answered this vocabulary item correctly at least once.

Verb.title: Verb
Verb.description: Represents a verb with its conjugations and translation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the verb entity.

infinitive.description: The infinitive form of the verb.

translation.description: The German translation of the verb.

forms.description: An object containing all tenses and their conjugated forms.

aiNote.description: An AI-generated tip or mnemonic for remembering the verb.

isMastered.description: True if the user has mastered the verb, e.g., by answering its infinitive correctly.

UserSettings.title: UserSettings
UserSettings.description: Represents user-specific settings for the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user settings entity.

enableConfetti.description: Whether to show confetti animation on high scores.

hapticFeedback.description: Whether to enable haptic feedback on supported devices.

vocabQueryDirection.description: Query direction for vocabulary flashcards (true: definition first).

vocabShowHints.description: Whether to show hints on vocabulary flashcards.

vocabOverviewDirection.description: Which side to show first in vocabulary lists.

verbQueryDirection.description: Query direction for verb practice (true: definition first).

verbShowHints.description: Whether to show hints during verb practice.

darkMode.description: Whether dark mode is enabled or not.

LearningSession.title: LearningSession
LearningSession.description: Represents a learning session for a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the learning session entity.

startTime.description: The start time of the learning session.

endTime.description: The end time of the learning session.

LearningSessionVocabulary.title: LearningSessionVocabulary
LearningSessionVocabulary.description: Represents the vocabulary learned in a learning session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the learning session vocabulary entity.

correct.description: Whether the user answered the vocabulary correctly.

LearningSessionVerbAnswer.title: LearningSessionVerbAnswer
LearningSessionVerbAnswer.description: Represents a user's answer for a verb practice item in a learning session.

practiceItemId.description: The unique ID of the practiced item (e.g., verbId-tense-pronoun).

verbId.description: Reference to the base Verb entity.

definition.description: Stores public user profile information that is safe to be read by any authenticated user, used for features like user search.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user, same as their auth UID.

definition.description: Stores friendship requests and statuses between users. The document ID is a composite of the two user IDs, sorted alphabetically and joined by an underscore.

params.name: friendshipId
params.description: The composite unique identifier for the friendship.

definition.description: Stores user data.  Top-level collection. User documents are created on user registration. All user data are nested under this collection.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores subjects created by the user. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their subjects.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: subjectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the subject.

definition.description: Stores vocabulary stacks within a subject. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their stacks.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: subjectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the subject.

params.name: stackId
params.description: The unique identifier for the stack.

definition.description: Stores vocabulary words within a stack. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their vocabulary.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: subjectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the subject.

params.name: stackId
params.description: The unique identifier for the stack.

params.name: vocabularyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the vocabulary.

definition.description: Stores verbs and their conjugations for a subject. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their verbs.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: subjectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the subject.

params.name: verbId
params.description: The unique identifier for the verb.

definition.description: Stores user-specific settings.  Path-based ownership. Although only one settings document is anticipated, using a collection allows future multi-settings document use.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: settingsId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user settings. There should be one settings document for each user.

definition.description: Stores learning sessions for the user. Path-based ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: learningSessionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the learning session.

definition.description: Stores vocabulary learned in a learning session. Path-based ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: learningSessionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the learning session.

params.name: vocabularyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the vocabulary.

definition.description: Stores verb answers for a specific learning session. Path-based ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The user's ID.

params.name: learningSessionId
params.description: The learning session's ID.

params.name: verbAnswerId
params.description: The answer's ID.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to support the Vocaro application's core features, including user authentication, subject/vocabulary management, learning mode, and settings customization, while adhering to the principles of Authorization Independence, Clarity of Intent, DBAC (Database-Based Access Control), QAPs (Queries are not Filters), and Invariants. The structure leverages path-based ownership and denormalization to ensure secure and scalable data access.

*   **Authorization Independence:** Achieved through path-based ownership for user-specific data.  For example, subjects, stacks, vocabulary, verbs, learning sessions, and user settings are all stored under the `/users/{userId}` path, eliminating the need for `get()` calls in security rules to verify ownership. No collection relies on parent attributes for authorization.  All security rules can be based on `request.auth.uid` and the document path.

*   **Clarity of Intent:** The hierarchical structure clearly represents the relationships between users and their data (subjects, stacks, vocabulary).  Naming conventions are consistent (e.g., `userId`, `subjectId`, `stackId`).

*   **DBAC (Database-Based Access Control):**  Authorization relies solely on `request.auth.uid` and the document path. There are no custom claims required.

*   **QAPs (Queries are not Filters):** Path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}/subjects/{subjectId}`) enables secure `list` operations, as rules can enforce that only the authenticated user can access their own subjects, stacks, and vocabulary.

*   **Invariants:** The structure supports data integrity by enforcing ownership via path structure. Timestamps can be added to entities if needed (e.g., creation/modification timestamps). Denormalization is used to maintain authorization context without relying on `get()` calls.

**Specific Design Choices and Justifications:**

*   `/users/{userId}`: Root collection for all user-specific data, ensuring clear ownership and simplifies security rules.
*   `/users/{userId}/subjects/{subjectId}`: Stores subjects created by the user.
*   `/users/{userId}/subjects/{subjectId}/stacks/{stackId}`: Stores vocabulary stacks within each subject.
*   `/users/{userId}/subjects/{subjectId}/verbs/{verbId}`: Stores verbs and their conjugations for a subject.
*   `/users/{userId}/subjects/{subjectId}/stacks/{stackId}/vocabulary/{vocabularyId}`: Stores individual vocabulary items within a stack.
*   `/users/{userId}/settings/{settingsId}`: Stores user-specific settings. While only one settings document is expected per user, using a collection allows for easier future expansion if multiple settings documents are needed.
*   `/users/{userId}/learningSessions/{learningSessionId}`: Stores learning sessions for the user.
*   `/users/{userId}/learningSessions/{learningSessionId}/vocabulary/{vocabularyId}`: Stores vocabulary learned in a learning session.
*   `/users/{userId}/learningSessions/{learningSessionId}/verbAnswers/{verbAnswerId}`: Stores answers for practiced verb forms within a learning session.
